prompt_config.theme: Renaissance Florence 1504 - Ultimate Cultural Time Travel Experience
prompt_config.photography_style: Aspirational travel advertising, cultural tourism marketing

main_prompt: Dynamic travel agency promotional content for Renaissance Florence 1504 cultural tour, 9:16 vertical format for Stories and Reels, luxury tourism campaign style, excited tourists experiencing Renaissance culture vertically - trying on period costumes with towering Duomo above, painting in Leonardo's workshop with vertical architectural backdrop, watching David unveiling at Palazzo Vecchio with tall tower reaching skyward, Renaissance banquet scene, spectacular golden hour Tuscan lighting flowing through vertical composition, Brunelleschi's dome towering majestically in vertical frame, vibrant appealing Renaissance colors, sense of cultural wonder and accessible luxury, immersive vertical storytelling showing both Renaissance spectacle and comfortable tourist experience, aspirational cultural travel imagery optimized for mobile viewing, 8K detailed, makes viewers want to swipe up and book immediately

composition_notes.stories_reels_optimization: Vertical 9:16 cultural travel marketing for immersive mobile viewing, emphasizes vertical Renaissance architecture and tourist activities
composition_notes.vertical_storytelling: Composition flows from ground-level tourist experience upward through Renaissance architecture to Tuscan sky
framing_options: Option 1: Ground-level tourist in costume with Duomo dome towering vertically above, dramatic scale
Option 2: Vertical workshop scene with tourists learning art, tall palazzo windows above
Option 3: Tourist POV filming David statue vertically with Palazzo tower reaching skyward behind
Option 4: Vertical banquet table with Renaissance palazzo interior rising above
composition_notes.mobile_engagement: Optimized for vertical mobile with swipe-up appeal for booking
composition_notes.safe_zones: Key elements positioned to avoid Stories UI

tourist_activities_vertical.costume_fitting: Tourists trying Renaissance costumes in foreground, Duomo towering above, fun immersive vertical moment
tourist_activities_vertical.art_workshops: Hands-on painting/sculpture with Renaissance masters, tall workshop windows creating vertical depth
tourist_activities_vertical.guided_tours: Professional guides leading tourists through narrow medieval streets opening to towering Renaissance monuments
tourist_activities_vertical.cultural_events: Renaissance banquets, performances, demonstrations filling vertical frame from table to palazzo ceiling

vertical_attractions.duomo_tower: Brunelleschi's dome perfect for vertical composition, red terracotta and marble reaching skyward
vertical_attractions.palazzo_tower: Tall Torre d'Arnolfo of Palazzo Vecchio emphasizing vertical drama
vertical_attractions.tall_buildings: Florentine buildings flanking narrow streets creating vertical corridors
vertical_attractions.vertical_spaces: Renaissance interiors with high ceilings, tall windows, vertical architectural drama

vertical_colors.gradient: Warm ochre ground level flowing to golden peachy Tuscan sky at top
vertical_colors.vibrant_flow: Rich Renaissance colors (crimsons, blues, greens) flowing through vertical composition

vertical_marketing.immersive_pov: First-person perspective making viewer feel present, creating desire to experience
vertical_marketing.swipe_up_appeal: Compelling vertical imagery designed for Stories ad with booking call-to-action
vertical_marketing.mobile_optimized: Colors and composition perfect for mobile screen viewing
